title: Sobriety In Search.
content:
To seek of God more than we well can find,
    Argues a strong distemper of the mind.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Sobriety In Search.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
